docs.title: Home
docs.text:
Lore Chronicle

The Signal Tower For Your Project Memory

Lore captures decisions, facts, and hard-won lessons as a living story your AI tools can read. Build your world once. Summon it in every session.

Start The Ritual Read The Command Grimoire

docs.title: The Lorebook Loop
docs.text:
1. Capture what matters: decisions, facts, preferences, and relics.
  2. Search memory semantically when context fades.
  3. Export a shared chronicle for Copilot, Claude, Cursor, and agent tools.

docs.title: Chapters
docs.text:
Chapter I: Summoning

Install Lore, prepare your environment, and begin the ritual.

Chapter II: Arcana

Learn spells, tomes, relics, and how the chronicle shapes memory.

Chapter III: Incantations

Master the CLI commands that capture and invoke project wisdom.

Chapter IV: Legends

Quick answers to common lorecrafting questions.

docs.title: Your Party Loadout
docs.text:
Spells

Focused memory entries for architecture calls, guardrails, and standards.

Tomes

Category vaults that keep project knowledge organized and retrievable.

Relics

Raw capture from sessions, diffs, and docs before curation into trusted memory.

Chronicle

The canonical export file that gives every assistant shared narrative context.

docs.title: Quick Cast
docs.text:
lore onboard
lore add decisions "Auth service is sole JWT issuer"
lore search "why did we split read/write workloads"
lore export

docs.title: Move Existing Pages Into This Site
docs.text: Place markdown pages in docs/, then add them to nav in mkdocs.yml.

docs.title: Onboard
docs.text: lore onboard

docs.title: Add Memory
docs.text: lore add decisions "Use PostgreSQL for row-level locking"

docs.title: Search Memory
docs.text: lore search "why did we choose postgres"

docs.title: Export Context Files
docs.text: lore export

docs.title: Spell
docs.text: A single memory entry: a decision, fact, preference, or summary.

docs.title: Tome
docs.text: A category that stores related spells, such as decisions or facts.

docs.title: Relic
docs.text: A raw artifact captured for later distillation into spells.

docs.title: Chronicle
docs.text: CHRONICLE.md is the complete exported memory source for AI tools.

docs.title: Is lore cloud-based?
docs.text: No. Lore stores memory locally in your repository.

docs.title: Does lore require API keys?
docs.text: No.

docs.title: Which AI tools are supported?
docs.text: Lore exports a central chronicle and lean adapter files for several popular assistants.

docs.title: How do I migrate docs from another repo?
docs.text: Copy your markdown files into docs/, then add them to nav in mkdocs.yml.

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text: • Python 3.10+

docs.title: Install From PyPI
docs.text: pip install lore-book

docs.title: Local Development Install
docs.text: pip install -e .

docs.title: Optional Semantic Search Dependencies
docs.text: pip install "lore-book[semantic]"

docs.title: Setup Semantic Search
docs.text: lore setup semantic
